items.headline_en: Delivering Low Latency Voice Ai At Scale
items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "Delivering Low Latency Voice Ai At Scale".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=How OpenAI delivers low-latency voice AI at scale published=Mon, 04 May 2026 00:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/delivering-low-latency-voice-ai-at-scale description=How OpenAI rebuilt its WebRTC stack to power real-time Voice AI with low latency, global scale, and seamless conversational turn-taking. title=OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS published=Tue, 28 Apr 2026 00:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/openai-on-aws description=OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
diff_excerpt: +title=How OpenAI delivers low-latency voice AI at scale
+description=How OpenAI rebuilt its WebRTC stack to power real-time Voice AI with low latency, global scale, and seamless conversational turn-taking.
description=OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.
+title=OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
+description=OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
description=Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
description=Learn how Codex helps you go beyond chat by automating tasks, connecting tools, and producing real outputs like docs and dashboards.
-description=Learn how to get started with Codex by setting up projects, creating threads, and completing your first tasks with step-by-step guidance.
